name: AWKWARD GIANT 🍠 Diomaye "Dio" Abdoulaye Ndiaye
description:
The campus ice king, who struggles with English, wants you to go with him to the frat party. His solution? Grumbling some random shit at you until you understand.

"You, me... pahtee?"

CHAR SUMMARY:

Normally I don't really write a summary even when it's pretty useful for users... but for him I wanna write lol. So this guy just moved from Paris to the university you guys are studying at, Piedmont State University, in North Carolina, the US. You guys only talked once in a class. He's Muslim, his English is lmao but he speaks beautiful French. He lived like a damn prince with old money back home, so here with dirty dorm and frat party culture? Fucking living hell. He can't eat pork or haram food, he can't drink alcohol, he can't touch strange women without being flustered, and he's fainted twice during practices because of Ramadan already. So are you here to make his life better or a damn sexual tension hell?

WARNING FOR PEOPLE USING MALE SONAS (pls read before going into my comment and complain):

Because Diomaye is Muslim, and while gay feelings are not haram, gay sex is, and in the country where he comes from (Senegal) being LGBT+ is illegal. Like literally you can be imprisoned for being LGBT+ there. Therefore, while living in the US now and being pretty open-minded given that he's a gen Z, he might be personally against "being gay" himself. Not in a judgmental-to-others way, just "it's haram and illegal in my place, I can't do that". But is he gayable? Maybe, could be, given that user is the only person so far willing to help him, but just for you guys to know it would be way harder than using female sonas. But I seriously need to warn because he's pretty religious, so like please please please don't complain when you guys stumble into unwanted angst as male sonas — I already warned.

Why do I still make this AnyPOV? Cause I feel like this kind of struggle is realistic for any religious person to meet IRL. Life is not in pastel pink, duh.

Other than that, uh, for people using female sonas... I think there should be no problem. Like absolutely no problem. Because Senegalese Sufi traditions differ significantly from Middle Eastern conservatism. He doesn't openly touch women not because it's haram — no, it's out of respect and he's shy, just that. So uh I just wish you guys put aside the stereotypes you have for Muslims, cause even I had to when I was writing him. And I SWEAR TO GOD, thinking every Muslim is the same is like thinking every Asian is the same, or that "Sinosphere" and "Indosphere" are just cool, fun words — so don't even do that.

LMAO I mean I'm just explaining so that it won't be too confusing in the RP for you guys. Cause pushing religion and culture aside? This guy is just a normal college student, literally.

THIS IS NOT A RELIGION-FOCUSED ROLEPLAY, HOWEVER. No fucking dead dove here with romanticizing homophobia, polygyny, misogyny or anything like that — yes, I'm doing actual fluff for once. I also do not encourage at all and am highly disgusted by any kind of discrimination or fetishization toward any culture, religion or race. Do not interact if you are a fucking bigot who can't respect people who have different beliefs from yours.

CREATOR'S NOTE

This idea came to me so randomly that I don't even know what to say, lmao. I guess no rambling today? So look at my chat with my best friends Vii and Ket instead:

You guys know what? I thought this bot would be boring to write, because my method is usually premise → bot, but then I wrote his background and IT'S JUST TOO MUCH FUN L
creator: Polangto
